name: yqx-tech-service-suite
description: A full-chain technology service toolkit bridging demand and supply in a closed loop. The demand side covers tech demand mining, results search & matching, value assessment, deal plan generation, full-lifecycle project follow-up, and policy & funding matching. The supply side covers product opportunity discovery, product definition & planning, technical solution demonstration, prototype validation, mass production planning, commercialization strategy, and fundraising preparation. Supports auto-enhancement via integration with platforms such as Yiqixin and Zheqi Home, with automatic access to eight major categories of sci-tech service resources nationwide, or can be used with manual input only.
descriptionZh: 科技服务全流程工具，贯通从需求和供给两端流程闭环。需求端覆盖技术需求挖掘、成果搜索匹配、价值评估、对接方案生成、项目全周期跟进和政策资金匹配；供给端覆盖产品机会发现、产品定义规划、技术论证、原型验证、量产规划、商业化策略和融资准备。可支持连接益企新、浙企之家等服务后自动增强，自动链接全国科技金融、综合科技咨询、企业孵化、知识产权、研发设计、技术转移转化、检验检测、信息技术和知识产权等八大领域科技服务资源，也可纯手动输入使用。
